serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years (N53/N57 rows) or 3 years first then 2 years (other mods) — see garage.wiki table; BMW owner's manual.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km MFR: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki F10/F18; BMW TIS N55).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — brake fluid table; BMW owner's manual F10
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change (60,000 km); BMW TIS N55
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
